Container.Name: MediaInsight
Container.Overview:
MediaInsight is a beautiful, modern web application that scans your video collection and reveals fascinating insights about your media library.
Features: - 📊 Codec Analytics - Real-time breakdown of H.265/HEVC, H.264, AV1, and other video codecs - 💾 Storage Insights - Track library size across multiple folders - 📈 Bitrate Intelligence - Understand your average bitrates and encoding quality - 💰 Savings Calculator - See how much space you could save by re-encoding - 🔄 Smart Scanning - Automated library scans - 🎨 Beautiful UI - Responsive, modern interface with Lucid Fabrics branding
Built with Angular 19 + NgRx + NestJS for optimal performance.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: Port for accessing MediaInsight API and Web UI

Config.Name: Media Path
Config.Description: Path to your media library (read-only recommended)

Config.Name: Downloads Path
Config.Description: Path to your downloads folder (optional, read-only)

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Path to store MediaInsight configuration and scan results
